# Vayb

> South Africa's mobile-first ticketing platform. Discover concerts, festivals, sports and more — tickets delivered by email with low fees and same-day payouts for organisers.

## Pages

- [Discover](/): Browse trending events, festivals, sports, music and comedy across South Africa.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to buy tickets and manage your bookings.
- [My tickets](/tickets): View and manage tickets you've purchased.
